DataCalcInsightTemplate.expression: SELECT marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.Id__c AS MarketingEventId__c, marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.IAValue__c AS Sector__c, marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.RiskOppFlag__c AS RiskOppFlag__c, marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.InteractionId_ReferThis__c AS InteractionId__c, COUNT(marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.Id__c) AS RecordCount__c, MAX(marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.CreatedDateTime__c) AS LatestCreatedDateTime__c FROM marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm WHERE marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.ProcessedFlag__c = 'N' GROUP BY marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.Id__c, marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.IAValue__c, marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.RiskOppFlag__c, marketevents_c_dmo_IngestionAPI__dlm.InteractionId_ReferThis__c
